meaning: n.逆戟鲸,类逆戟鲸,魔鬼,兽人
examples: I am just an orca, but I am glad that my life has counted for something.
Researchers believe their lungs were seared by the toxic fumes, but orca carcasses usually sink, so no autopsy was possible.
The unorthodox approach proved successful after the team from Stanford University came up with a design modeled on the structure of the ear of orca wales.
